comments.author: @ExploreNatureToday
comments.text: If you don't delete the videos where you copied footage owned by us, I will make sure this channel will disappear.

comments.author: @leanneadams2549
comments.text: it is a fabulous drive !!! actually my favorite drive - ever !!!

replies.author: @TruePlanetOffical
replies.text: Thanks so much! Comments like yours make these documentaries worth creating. It's amazing how one great drive can stay with you for a lifetime. If you enjoyed the journey, we'd really appreciate a like, a share, and subscribing for more hidden places to explore!

replies.author: @Shelovedac
replies.text: @TruePlanetOfficalyou guys should definitely do a Virginia one or Virginia Beach. would love to see some places I missed or have visited.

replies.author: @TruePlanetOffical
replies.text: 😂 That gave us a good laugh! Sounds like you live in a pretty incredible neighborhood. Thanks for watching and sharing! If you're enjoying these hidden places, don't forget to like, subscribe, and share to help us keep exploring.

comments.author: @mysteryvault-h2o
comments.text: As a sailor who's lived in the Keys for the past few years, I really enjoyed this video and found it very informative. My only minor complaint is that some of the footage looks like it might be AI-generated.

replies.author: @TruePlanetOffical
replies.text: Thank you! We really appreciate you watching and sharing your perspective as someone who's actually lived in the Keys. And thanks for pointing out the AI-looking shots—we're always working to improve the viewing experience and truly value feedback like yours. If you enjoyed the documentary, please consider subscribing, giving it a like, and sharing it with fellow travel lovers!
